Document:
# Creating Custom Skills
This page guides you through adding a new skill tree and spells to OpenEdge 14.
## Step 1: Define the Spell Action
Create the spell entity prototype in [mono]Resources/Prototypes/_OE14/Magic/Spells/[/mono]:
- type: entity id: SpellMyNewSpell name: My New Spell components: - type: InstantAction - type: OE14ActionManaCost cost: 15 - type: OE14Spell # Add spell-specific components here
## Step 2: Define the Skill
Create the skill prototype in [mono]Resources/Prototypes/_OE14/Skills/[/mono]:
- type: OE14SkillPrototype id: MyNewSkill name: My New Skill tier: 1 pointCost: 1 grants: - SpellMyNewSpell statModifiers: Intelligence: 1 # Optional stat bonus
## Step 3: Add to a Tree
Add your skill to an existing tree or create a new one in the species prototype.
## Step 4: Test
1. Build and run the server 2. Create a character with the species that has this tree 3. Spend points to unlock the skill 4. Verify the spell appears in the action bar
## Content Under Construction
Step-by-step guide with full code examples coming soon. See [textlink="Adding New Spells" link="OE14_DEV_Guide_Spells"] for a more complete walkthrough.
